Weakened Constitution.entries.1: As a {@action Magic|XPHB} action, you can expend a number of {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB} equal to your Transformation Stage to remove one level of {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} gained in this manner. You gain no other benefit from those expended {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB}.
Weakened Constitution.name: Weakened Constitution
Weapon Aptitude.entries.0: The weapons you wield might save your life one day, and you know their secrets. You have proficiency with three weapons of your choice.
Weapon Aptitude.entries.1.entries.0: If you take this trait multiple times, you gain proficiency with three new weapons each time. Additionally, choose one weapon with which you have proficiency. You have a +1 bonus to damage rolls with that weapon.
Weapon Aptitude.entries.1.name: Weapon Specialist
Weapon Aptitude.name: Weapon Aptitude
Weight of the Ages.entries.0: The weight of time is degrading for your form, and only the magic of your soul vessel holds it together. If your soul vessel is reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, your soul is lost; you are killed instantly and your body crumbles to dust.
Weight of the Ages.name: Weight of the Ages
Well Protected.entries.0: Your ability to roll with even the worst attacks means that armor would only slow you down. When you are not wearing armor, your AC is equal to 13 + your Dexterity modifier.
Well Protected.entries.1.entries.0: If you take this trait twice, when you make a Dexterity saving throw or are targeted by a ranged attack, you can use a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the saving throw or impose {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the ranged attack roll. You can use this feature a number of times equal to your {@variantrule Proficiency|XPHB|Proficiency Bonus}, regaining all expended uses when you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.
Well Protected.entries.1.name: Protective Cover
Well Protected.name: Well Protected
Weretrap.entries.0: A Weretrap detonates when its fragile exterior is broken. You can take a {@action Utilize|XPHB} action to set the Weretrap in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of you. A creature within 30 feet must succeed on a Wisdom ({@skill Perception|XPHB}) check against your Trapper Gadget DC to spot the trap. Creatures have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on this check.
Weretrap.entries.1: A creature that steps into a space containing a Weretrap triggers the trap and makes a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, the creature takes {@damage 3d10} Bludgeoning damage and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. On a successful save, the creature takes half as much damage only.
Weretrap.entries.2: The Weretrap can also be used as a Light Ranged weapon with the Finesse and Thrown property. It has a normal range of 20 feet and a long range of 60 feet. On a hit, the Weretrap deals {@damage 3d10} Bludgeoning damage and the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.
Weretrap.entries.3: The Weretrap is destroyed after it is triggered or thrown, regardless of whether it hits or misses.
Weretrap.name: Weretrap
Whispers of the Grave.entries.0: You can cast {@spell Speak with Dead|XPHB} without expending a spell slot.
Whispers of the Grave.name: Whispers of the Grave
Witch Sight.entries.0: You have {@sense Truesight|XPHB} with a range of 30 feet.
Witch Sight.name: Witch Sight
Wizard.entries.0: You prepare any two spells from the {@filter Wizard spell list|spells|class=Wizard} that are of a level you can cast. These count as Bard spells for you but do not count against your number of Prepared Spells.
Wizard.entries.1: When you gain a level in this class, you can choose one of the Wizard spells you have prepared and replace it with another spell from the Wizard spell list of a level you can cast.
Wizard.name: Волшебник
Writhing Tendrils.entries.0: You gain the ability to grow long, tendril-like appendages out of your body. As a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}, these tendrils sprout from you. While you maintain these tendrils, you gain the following benefits:
Writhing Tendrils.entries.1.items.0: When a creature moves to within 5 feet of you, you can try to push it back as a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB}. Unless the creature succeeds on a Strength saving throw, it is pushed 5 feet away from you and its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is reduced to 0 until the start of your next turn. The DC of the saving throw is 8 plus your {@variantrule Proficiency|XPHB|Proficiency Bonus} plus your Transformation Stage.
Writhing Tendrils.entries.1.items.1: Your tendrils can protect you if you move. You can use a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} to Disengage.
Writhing Tendrils.entries.1.items.2: As a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to being targeted with a melee attack, you can cause that creature to have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on all melee attacks it makes that turn.
Writhing Tendrils.entries.2: The tendrils last for 1 minute. You can use a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} to retract your tendrils.
Writhing Tendrils.entries.3: You can use this ability a number of times equal to your {@variantrule Proficiency|XPHB|Proficiency Bonus}, and you regain all uses when you finish a {@variantrule Short Rest|XPHB|Short} or {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.
Writhing Tendrils.name: Writhing Tendrils
